title: Phucagrostis isoetifolia
taxonomy: Phucagrostis isoetifolia is a species in the plant family Cyperaceae. It is a type of sedge, a monocotyledonous flowering plant. The classification of Phucagrostis isoetifolia is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, order Poales, family Cyperaceae, genus Phucagrostis. The genus Phucagrostis is a relatively small group of sedges found in Southeast Asia. Further research is required to confirm the exact classification of Phucagrostis isoetifolia.
uses: Unfortunately, I don't have any information on the medicinal uses of Phucagrostis isoetifolia.
